series_metadata.series_title: Delinquent Accounts Certified to Attorney General
series_metadata.series_description: Records of unpaid invoices certified to Attorney General''s office for collection.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until paid and audited by state and report released, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until paid and audited by state and report released, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
